description_long: This is a vibrant, multi-tiered celebration cake featuring two stacked layers, each decorated with colorful fondant and icing. The lower tier is adorned with a garden motif, including flowers, grass, and small decorative elements, while the upper tier displays a sky scene with clouds and a sun. The cake is topped with a large orange flower and various round decorations, possibly representing fruit or candy. Two fondant figures of children stand on either side of the cake, adding a playful, character-driven element. The front of the cake features a plaque with the word 'SUPER' and a central medallion, surrounded by red spherical decorations. The cake sits on a green, flower-strewn base, likely made of fondant or icing, and is presented on a white square board.
description: A colorful, two-tiered celebration cake with fondant figures, floral and sky decorations, and a large orange flower topper, set on a white board.
description_view_0: Front view showing two fondant children, a 'SUPER' plaque, and vibrant floral decorations at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ladder-like decoration, partial view of a fondant child, and the continuation of the floral motif.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sky and cloud motif, sun illustration, and the orange flower topper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the ladder, partial view of the second fondant child, and more floral decorations.
